name: Reptile Net Hammock, Fixed Durable Practical Reptile Hammock Breathable with Suction Cups for Anoles for Iguanas for Lizards(Green, S)
description: Feature:1. Each piece of the reptile hammock comes with 3 suction cups that can be placed in the tank at will at multiple angles.2. Made from breathable mesh, will be the place for your favorite reptile to hang out and climb around.3. The strong suction cups will hold your lounger in place no matter in glass, or acrylic aquariums, terrariums, vivariums, or your window in the sun.4. A good hammock for reptiles, it can be used as a bed or playing hammock, and it is also suitable for other small pets.5.
